title: cotula microglossa
intro: Cotula microglossa, also known as Broad-leaved Cotula or Marsh Cotula, is a perennial herb native to Australia and New Zealand. It has been traditionally used in herbal medicine for its medicinal properties, which include anti-inflammatory and antimicrobial effects. The health benefits of Cotula microglossa include its potential to reduce inflammation and alleviate symptoms associated with respiratory and gastrointestinal issues. Cotula microglossa can be prepared as a herbal tea, infusion, or tincture, and is often used in conjunction with other herbs to enhance its medicinal properties.
